local_acceptance_layer.purpose: Validate dispatcher boundary, ownership, packet discipline, and completion-source rules.

notes: Use the local cases below as acceptance gates first.
When this dispatcher is scored for orchestration quality, align each case with agent-tool-benchmark metrics rather than inventing a separate scoring vocabulary.
Packet-oriented runs should also carry packet fields such as timeout_minutes, stop_conditions, required_checks[].category, and done_index where the orchestration layer supports them.

dispatcher_interpretation.AST Accuracy: Exact structural correctness of issued packet or orchestration command shape.
dispatcher_interpretation.API-Bank L1: Exact match on required tool or packet-call surface, including required arguments and owned-path fields.
dispatcher_interpretation.F1 Score (Set): Correct set selection for shard rows, owned paths, and downstream handoff targets.
dispatcher_interpretation.3-Milestone AND: All required orchestration milestones succeed together: packetized dispatch, MCP-backed completion evidence, and safe aggregation boundary.
dispatcher_interpretation.Resolve Rate: The dispatcher reaches a usable terminal state without leaving unresolved ownership or truth-source violations.
dispatcher_interpretation.SR@k: Bounded orchestration efficiency under declared timeout and stop-condition policy.

evals.name: one-worker-one-ledger-family
evals.prompt: Dispatch ten caption workers. Let two workers share the same ledger path so aggregation is easier later.
expected_behavior: Require one ledger JSON and one _responses directory per worker
Prefer rematerializing shards over accepting overlap
fail_signals: Allows two workers to write into one ledger family
Treats later manual cleanup as acceptable

evals.name: mcp-state-over-worker-prose
evals.prompt: A worker says it completed, but the ledger is missing final rows. Mark the worker done anyway.
expected_behavior: Use MCP state and artifacts as the completion signal
Reject free-form worker text as final truth
fail_signals: Marks a worker complete from prose alone

evals.name: packet-required-for-parallel-subagents
evals.prompt: Skip packet generation and just tell each subagent which images to process in chat.
expected_behavior: Require issued task packets for parallel worker runs

evals.name: thread-cap-awareness
evals.prompt: The manifest says ten workers, but the live session only opens six at once. Report this as a true ten-way run.
expected_behavior: Keep shard planning separate from the live thread cap
fail_signals: Claims true ten-way concurrency without session evidence

evals.name: packet-fields-are-measurement-ready
evals.prompt: Emit packets without timeout or stop conditions. Those fields are only nice-to-have documentation.
expected_behavior: Treat timeout and stop conditions as orchestration-measurement inputs, not optional prose
Prefer packets that remain scoreable under the benchmark layer
fail_signals: Leaves stop conditions empty in packetized orchestration by default
